title: Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur
tagline: Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Ulagalantha Perumal Temple or Trivikrama Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Tirukkoyilur, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Ulagalantha Perumal Temple or Trivikrama Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Tirukkoyilur, Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Naalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Ulagalantha Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Poongothai. The temple is believed to have been built by the Medieval Cholas, with later contributions from Vijayanagara kings and Madurai Nayaks. The tem

topPlaces.name: Tirukkoyilur taluk
topPlaces.description: Tirukkoyilur taluk is a taluk of Kallakurichi district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Tirukkoyilur.

topPlaces.name: Tirukoilur
topPlaces.description: Tirukoilur also spelt as Tirukkoyilur or Tirukovilur is a Town and the Headquarters of Tirukoilur taluk in Kallakurichi district, Tamil Nadu, India. This town is located on the southern bank of Thenpennai River and famous for the Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, the Veerateeswarar Temple and the Kabilar Kundru.

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Thirukovilur
topPlaces.description: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Thirukoilur Veerattam) in Tirukoilur, a panchayat town in Kallakurichi district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Cholas period in the 10th century.

topPlaces.name: Kabilar Kundru
topPlaces.description: Kabilar Kundru (or Kabilar rock) is a hill rock in the middle of the Ponnaiyar River near Tirukoilur in Viluppuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is known for Tamil poet Kapilar did Vadakirrutal (fast unto death) here, after his friend Vēl Pāri was killed in a battle.

topPlaces.name: Atulya Nadheswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Atulya Nadheswarar Temple (அதுல்யநாதேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Arakandanallur in Thirukoilur taluk, a town panchayat in Viluppuram district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Atulya Nadheswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Eravalam
topPlaces.description: Eravalam is a tiny village in Tirukoilur, Kallakurichi district, Tamil Nadu, India. A new sugar mill is planned, spread across the villages of Venmar, Eravalam, Kachikuppam and Keezhthazhanur, and this has generated some controversy.

topPlaces.name: Arakandanallur
topPlaces.description: Arakandanallur is a panchayat town in Viluppuram district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The place is known for the historic Atulya Nadheswarar Temple built in rock-cut architecture on a small hillock.

topPlaces.name: Vilandai
topPlaces.description: Vilandai is a village in Kallakurichi district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated 8 km away from Thirukovilur.

items.note: Tirukkoyilur taluk is a taluk of Kallakurichi district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Tirukkoyilur.

Tirukoilur also spelt as Tirukkoyilur or Tirukovilur is a Town and the Headquarters of Tirukoilur taluk in Kallakurichi district, Tamil Nadu, India. This town is located on the southern bank of Thenpennai River and famous for the Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, the Veerateeswarar Temple and the Kabilar Kundru.

Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Thirukoilur Veerattam) in Tirukoilur, a panchayat town in Kallakurichi district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Cholas period in the 10th century.

Kabilar Kundru (or Kabilar rock) is a hill rock in the middle of the Ponnaiyar River near Tirukoilur in Viluppuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is known for Tamil poet Kapilar did Vadakirrutal (fast unto death) here, after his friend Vēl Pāri was killed in a battle.

Atulya Nadheswarar Temple (அதுல்யநாதேஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Arakandanallur in Thirukoilur taluk, a town panchayat in Viluppuram district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Atulya Nadheswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

Eravalam is a tiny village in Tirukoilur, Kallakurichi district, Tamil Nadu, India. A new sugar mill is planned, spread across the villages of Venmar, Eravalam, Kachikuppam and Keezhthazhanur, and this has generated some controversy.

Arakandanallur is a panchayat town in Viluppuram district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The place is known for the historic Atulya Nadheswarar Temple built in rock-cut architecture on a small hillock.
Vilandai is a village in Kallakurichi district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated 8 km away from Thirukovilur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (142 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (140 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur?
faq.a: Stays in Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ulagalantha Perumal Temple, Tirukoyilur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tirukkoyilur taluk, Tirukoilur, Veerateeswarar Temple, Thirukovilur, Kabilar Kundru, Atulya Nadheswarar Temple.
